name: All Binary Operators In One Expression
description: a + b - c * d / e % f & g | h ^ i << j >> k — exercises all binary operators. Precedence (high to low): SHIFT(12) > FACTOR(9) > TERM(8) > AND(5, also ^) > OR(4). Grouping: shifts bind i/j/k, then factor groups c*d/e%f, then term groups a+b and subtraction, then & attaches g, then ^ attaches shifted result, and | joins the two halves.
source: a + b - c * d / e % f & g | h ^ i << j >> k
